---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Securo
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

> Planning something large or a change to a core part of Securo? Starting here is exactly right. Opening this issue first lets us align on the idea and timing before you build, which gives your contribution the clearest path to being merged. You're also welcome to talk it through on [Discord](https://discord.gg/rUqTKtQ9S4).

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? E.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request.
